rationale: No concrete in-scope fail-open or masked regression found. All gate errors return before phase/epic/finalization mutations. Leg 1 refuses on scan error or any orphan; choosing the first orphan is sufficient because approval stops. Leg 2 uses bead.WorktreeList, the production source behind FinalizeEpic's WorktreeOps.List, scopes candidates to this epic's closed IDs, and refuses list/closed-ID/ancestry errors. Leg 3 refuses unreadable plans and obligation errors, with recovery conditioned by branch state. Advisory reads only decorate an already-determined refusal; hatches are not consulted. Deviation C is required tightening: missing plan data must be rejected before the older zero-commit preflight, while valid-plan zero-commit behavior remains separately reachable. AC11 and AC13 directly discriminate the pre-scan abort and transient-probe race. Build, package tests, all 11 named tests, AC4, vet, lint, formatting, and fences passed. The disclosed two-enumeration concurrent-creation window and cross-spec blp6 loop remain explicitly out of scope under serialized lifecycle operation.

findings.leg_1_orphan_scan: ADDRESSED — all scan errors refuse; any non-empty orphan set refuses before mutation. orphans[0] is sufficient because one refusal blocks finalization; later orphans cannot slip through that invocation.
findings.leg_2_worktree_enumeration: ADDRESSED — same production enumeration source as FinalizeEpic, current-epic closed-ID scoping, unrelated-spec entries neither trigger nor suppress, and WorktreeList/ClosedEpicBeadIDs/ancestry errors all fail closed.
findings.leg_3_obligation: ADDRESSED — planErr and every obligation-check error refuse. Branch-present recovery is directly runnable; branch-absent recovery states restoration as a prerequisite before complete.
findings.r2_advisory: ADDRESSED — panel scan/tally failure can only omit decoration after refusal is selected; messages are pinned free of MINDSPEC_SKIP_PANEL and refut substrings.
findings.hatches: ADDRESSED — neither MINDSPEC_SKIP_PANEL nor enforcement.panel_gate is consulted by production gate logic; both bypass tests pass.
findings.deviation_A: ADDRESSED — plan fixtures are legitimate mechanical accommodations to the new fail-closed plan enumeration; assertions retain their original subjects.
findings.deviation_B: ADDRESSED — closed status correctly models impl-approve readiness once plan bead enumeration is active; open would properly fail the pre-existing status gate.
findings.deviation_C: ADDRESSED — missing plan.md is now deliberately intercepted by R3 before CommitCount. This is spec-mandated fail-closed tightening, not masking a legitimate no-op; a valid implementation lifecycle necessarily has an approved plan and valid-plan paths remain covered.
findings.deviation_D: ADDRESSED — OverrideADR isolates the warning-rendering test from an unrelated ADR gate activated by its newly required plan fixture; warning and FinalizeEpic assertions remain intact.
findings.deviation_E: ADDRESSED — the seventh seam is a legitimate, read-only branch-state recovery seam required by the plan's truthful-recovery wording and does not affect detection.
findings.AC11: ADDRESSED — MergeBase exit-128 aborts before orphan scan and all recorded mutations/finalization remain uncalled; removal of the pre-scan ref resolution or abort makes the named test red.
findings.AC13: ADDRESSED — probe miss plus enumerated non-ancestor refuses; list error refuses; ancestor and other-spec entries do not. Removing the added enumeration leg makes the race subtest red.
findings.ordinary_merge_paths: ADDRESSED — no in-scope ordinary-flow un-gated merge found. The global cross-spec blp6 behavior and the concurrent worktree-created-between-two-list-calls window are explicitly disclosed non-goals, bounded by scope/serialization rather than silently missed.
findings.empirical: ADDRESSED — go build ./... PASS; four-package go test PASS; all 11 grep-gated named tests PASS; AC4 PASS; BranchExistsE/show-ref 0 hits; gitutil diff empty; gofmt empty; go vet PASS; golangci-lint 0 issues. Initial default build cache write was sandbox-denied, then passed using /tmp GOCACHE with cached modules and GOPROXY=off.
